While John Fury strongly opposed the marriage, Tyson and Paris publicly defended their daughter, saying Venezuela was mature enough to make her own life decisions.

articles.title: KKR ends GT's streak; Green says team has 'fighting chance' for playoffs
articles.description: Kolkata Knight Riders beat Gujarat Titans by 29 runs, ending their 5-match winning streak. Finn Allen (93), Angkrish Raghuvanshi (82*), and Cameron Green (52*) helped KKR post 247/2. GT finished at 218/4 despite fifties from Gill and Buttler.

articles.description: Shubman Gill etched his name in IPL history, joining batting greats with his second 500-run season as captain. His explosive 85 against KKR propelled him past the milestone. Despite Gill's valiant effort and a strong partnership, Gujarat Titans fell short against Kolkata Knight Riders' formidable total. KKR secured a victory, while GT remains second in the standings.

articles.description: Gujarat Titans assistant coach Parthiv Patel highlighted dropped catches as the key factor in their 29-run loss to Kolkata Knight Riders. Missed opportunities, particularly on Finn Allen's dropped chances, proved costly as KKR posted a massive 247/2. Despite a strong partnership between Gill and Buttler, GT couldn't chase down the target.

articles.title: The $13.2M Cowboys first-round pick nobody talks about anymore - and why he urgently needs a reset
articles.description: Mazi Smith’s NFL career has reached a critical point after a disappointing stint with the Dallas Cowboys led to his inclusion in the Quinnen Williams trade. Analysts believe Smith still possesses elite physical traits, but technical flaws and inconsistent play have limited his impact. The New York Jets declined his fifth-year option, signaling uncertainty about his future. With pressure mounting and expectations lowered, Smith now enters 2026 facing perhaps his final opportunity to prove he can become a dependable NFL defensive tackle.

articles.title: Tyson Fury’s 16 year old daughter Venezuela Fury marries Noah Price in lavish Isle of Man wedding
articles.description: Venezuela Fury, the 16-year-old daughter of Tyson Fury and Paris Fury, married 19-year-old Noah Price in a lavish Isle of Man wedding. The couple shared a kiss outside the church after saying “I do.” Tyson Fury became emotional while walking his daughter down the aisle. Netflix crews filmed the ceremony, while friends, family, and celebrity guests joined the celebration.

With 12 wins and 5 losses, the Buffalo Bills finished second in the AFC East, just behind the New England Patriots. Though the team faced a heartbreaking loss against the Denver Broncos in the Divisional Round, all eyes are on the new season.
